title: ranunculus rotundellus
intro: Ranunculus rotundellus, also known as the round-leaved buttercup, is a plant species belonging to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae) and is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its alkaloids and glycosides. Consuming Ranunculus rotundellus has been associated with several health benefits, including the potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
